title: Tool Holster
description: A simple mod for Better Than Adventure that displays your last equipped tool.
body:
# Tool Holster **This mod requires [HalpLibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe)** A mod for Better Than Adventure that displays various tools on the back of the player.
(and possibly more customization in the future) ![Picture of a player with a holstered bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3a3e911a2df4e97b6e67f9f4e2ccfa16ab707c5.png)
